item.title: 6249 BCE
item.description: 6249 BCE Aryan Invasion of India (Iranian Farmers) Session Date: Oct 20, 1994 Q: When did the Aryans invade India? A: 8243 years ago. Q: Who was there before that? A: Asian tribes and number 3 prototype.

item.title: 4233 BCE

item.title: 4098 BCE
item.description: 4098 BCE Mohenjo-Daro (Built by Lizards) Session Date: Oct 20, 1994 Q: Who built the city of Mohenjo-Daro? A: Lizards directly. Coatzlmundi legend ties in to this directly look at illustrations on stones now.

item.title: 3218 BCE
item.description: 3218 BCE Baalbek (1st. cometary Venus Interaction): Session Date: Oct 20, 1994 Q: Who built the city of Baalbek? A: Antereans and early Sumerians. We meant Atlanteans.
